sentences.arabic: حِمَايَةُ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ أَمْرٌ ضَرُورِيٌّ.
sentences.translation: Zaštita ličnih informacija na internetu je neophodna stvar.
sentences.translationEn: Protecting personal information on the internet is a necessary matter.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْكَ اسْتِخْدَامُ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ لِحِسَابَاتِكَ.
sentences.translation: Moraš koristiti jake lozinke za svoje račune.
sentences.translationEn: You must use strong passwords for your accounts.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَفْتَحْ رَسَائِلَ مِنْ أَشْخَاصٍ مَجْهُولِينَ لِتَبْقَى آمِنًا.
sentences.translation: Ne otvaraj poruke od nepoznatih osoba kako bi ostao siguran.
sentences.translationEn: Do not open messages from unknown people to stay safe.
